seoTitle: Centennial Park vs Central Macdonald — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Centennial Park and Central Macdonald. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Centennial Park vs Central Macdonald: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Centennial Park and Central Macdonald.
heading: Centennial Park vs Central Macdonald — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Centennial Park, New South Wales and Central Macdonald, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Central Macdonald has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Centennial Park (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Centennial Park or Central Macdonald safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Centennial Park has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Central Macdonald scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Centennial Park scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Central Macdonald scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Centennial Park or Central Macdonald?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Central Macdonald has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.57% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
